title: coleus eminii
intro: Coleus eminii, also known as Coleus vettiveroides, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the coleus. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coleus eminii include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Coleus eminii may include infusion, decoction, or powder, often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
